рҹ”Қ 0 рқ—јрқ—Ҫрқ—Ірқ—» рқ—¶рқҳҖрқҳҖрқҳӮрқ—ІрқҳҖ

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

tui-use enables AI agents to interact with terminal-based programs like REPLs, debuggers, and TUI applications, which are typically inaccessible to automated scripts. It provides a way to send keystrokes and read the screen output as plain text, bridging the gap between human interaction and agent control.

Musicat is a sleek, cross-platform desktop music player and tagger designed for managing local music libraries. It offers features like gapless playback, smart playlists, metadata editing, album art fetching, and unique visualizations such as waveform and map views, all built with Svelte and Tauri.

The 'try' repository provides a simple, zero-configuration Ruby script to manage and quickly navigate through numerous small experiment directories. It helps developers keep their exploratory code organized with features like fuzzy search, smart sorting, and auto-dating.

Paper2Any is a Python-based tool designed to transform research papers, text, or topics into editable research figures, technical route diagrams, and presentation slides. It supports various input formats and leverages AI to automatically generate visual content, facilitating easier understanding and integration of complex information.

AionUi is a free, open-source desktop application that functions as a Cowork platform, enabling AI agents to work alongside users on their computer. It allows AI to interact with files, execute multi-step tasks, and automate processes, with features like remote access and 24/7 scheduling.
